EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for general Direct leads at the fourth attempt stage.
EmailTemplate.name: Direct Lead (General)_4th Attempt
EmailTemplate.subject: We still require information to complete your insurance quote
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
I’ve been unable to reach you and so have been unable to provide you with a business insurance quote.
If you are interested in proceeding with a quote, reply with the best date and time for me to call you. Alternatively you can give me a ring on 01242 808 740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
